title: Implement grantProductEntitlements stub
body: grant-entitlements.ts is a no-op stub. Payment confirmation handlers should call this to actually unlock product access for buyers — currently they do not.
rationale: Successful payments do not grant product entitlements until this is implemented.

title: PayPal token cache concurrent refresh
body: The PayPal token cache in paypal.ts can issue multiple concurrent tokens when a token expires under load. Consider adding a mutex/lock if token issuance becomes a bottleneck.
rationale: Safe but wasteful — documented in index.ts gotcha, but worth addressing if scale increases.
